title: Dishes accumulating in the sink
body: Hey, just noticing dishes piling up over the last few days. Could we agree to clean within a day?

title: Music after 11pm
body: Heads up — some loud music last night around 11:30. Can we keep things quiet on weeknights?

title: Stranger in living room last week
body: Saw someone I didn't recognise in the common room. Resolved offline; archiving.

title: Dishes left overnight
body: Could we agree on a 24-hour dish rule?
